name: Health Check Monitor

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ alert_type: 'heartbeat', severity: 'info', api_status: $json.api_status, postgres_status: $json.postgres, redis_status: $json.redis, ollama_status: $json.ollama, history_len: $json.history_len, detected_at: $json.detected_at }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ alert_type: $json.flapping ? 'health_flapping' : 'health_check_failed', severity: $json.severity, failed_services: $json.failed_services_csv, regressed_services: $json.regressed_csv, http_status_code: $json.statusCode, api_status: $json.api_status, postgres_status: $json.postgres, redis_status: $json.redis, ollama_status: $json.ollama, transitions_last_hour: $json.transitions, last_known_good: $json.last_known_good, detected_at: $json.detected_at }) }}

description: Every 15m: GET /api/system/health, then maintains a rolling 24h history in workflow staticData. Detects per-service regressions, flapping (>=3 status transitions in last hour), and emits last-known-good with rich Slack + /api/system/alerts payloads. On healthy steady state, posts a lightweight heartbeat alert.
